---
title: "NHS-OA Community"
image: "img/18.png"
links:
  - label: Website
    url: "https://nhsrcommunity.com/"
  - label: NHS-R Way
    url: "https://nhsrway.nhsrcommunity.com/"
  - label: Substack Newsletter
    url: "https://nhsrcommunity.substack.com/"
  - label: Slack
    url: "https://join.slack.com/t/nhsrcommunity/shared_invite/zt-2r1yjgkio-steh_TwjVUJXdMDhKl~kjA"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/nhs-r-community"
  - label: YouTube
    url: "https://www.youtube.com/c/nhsrcommunity"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:openanalytics.community@nhs.net"
  - label: Coffee and Coding
    url: "https://nhsrcommunity.com/coffee-and-code.html"
output:
  postcards::jolla
---
 
Welcome to NHS-OA Community's information postcard!

No matter where you are in your journey in learning open coding you are welcome 
to use and reuse all our resources. 

We are on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/search/results/all/?fetchDeterministicClustersOnly=true&heroEntityKey=urn%3Ali%3Aorganization%3A98205916&keywords=nhs-r%20community&origin=RICH_QUERY_SUGGESTION&position=1&sid=GfV), [Fosstodon](https://fosstodon.org/@NHSrCommunity) and [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/nhsrcommunity.bsky.social) but most of all you will find us at [Slack](https://join.slack.com/t/nhsrcommunity/shared_invite/zt-2r1yjgkio-steh_TwjVUJXdMDhKl~kjA).

We hope to see you soon!
